title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的Transformer方法解决开放车间排序问题
title_en: A Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL)-Based Transformer Method for Solving the Open Shop Scheduling Problem
summary_zh: 开放车间排序问题（OSSP）在工业和服务领域中普遍存在，但随着作业和机器数量增加，计算难度显著提升。传统精确方法难以应对大规模问题，经典调度规则和元启发式方法则需大量调参保证解的质量。本文提出了一种基于Transformer的调度策略，采用编码器-解码器架构和多头注意力机制，使用仅含处理时间矩阵的输入，在Taillard基准（4x4至10x10）上训练，生成的调度计划的完工时间通常在最优值的15-30%范围内。该策略在未经再训练的情况下应用于40x40至100x100的随机大规模实例，表现出对比经典调度启发式（SPT、LPT、MWKR、EST）具有良好的竞争力，平均误差在12.89%-15.12%间，优于SPT和LPT，表现与EST相近。结果表明，该Transformer策略具备从小规模实例推广到大规模问题的能力，且作为一种特征轻量的基于学习的方法，是经典调度规则的有效替代方案。
summary_en: The open shop scheduling problem (OSSP) is common in industrial and service contexts but becomes computationally challenging as jobs and machines increase. Exact methods become intractable, and classical dispatching rules or metaheuristics require significant tuning for large scales. This study proposes a Transformer-based scheduling policy using an encoder-decoder architecture with multi-head attention, trained solely on processing-time matrices from Taillard benchmarks (4x4 to 10x10), yielding feasible schedules within 15-30% of best-known makespans. When applied without retraining to larger instances (40x40 to 100x100), the Transformer policy achieved average gaps of 12.89%-15.12% relative to a standard lower bound and outperformed classical heuristics such as SPT and LPT, while remaining competitive with EST. These findings demonstrate the Transformer’s ability to generalize from small to much larger OSSP instances, providing a feature-light, learning-based alternative to classical dispatching rules.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究利用深度强化学习结合Transformer架构，成功解决了开放车间排序问题的规模和复杂性难题。其模型在小规模数据上训练后无需再训练就能推广到更大规模问题，体现了强大的泛化能力和实用价值，为工业排产优化提供了新的高效工具。
why_it_matters_en: This research leverages deep reinforcement learning with a Transformer architecture to tackle the complexity and scaling challenges of the open shop scheduling problem. The model trained on small instances generalizes effectively to larger problems without retraining, demonstrating strong practical value and a promising new tool for industrial scheduling optimization.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: A Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL)-Based Transformer Method for Solving the Open Shop Scheduling Problem. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: UP-NRPA：基于用户画像的嵌套展开策略自适应，用于目标导向对话系统中的大型语言模型规划
title_en: UP-NRPA: User Portrait based Nested Rollout Policy Adaptation for Planning with Large Language Models in Goal-oriented Dialogue Systems
summary_zh: 本文提出了UP-NRPA，一种基于用户画像的嵌套展开策略自适应在线框架，利用大型语言模型动态调整目标导向对话系统中的对话策略。该方法通过实时用户反馈和用户个性、偏好及目标的映射，实现无需离线强化学习即可适配多样化用户特征。UP-NRPA在协作与非协作对话基准测试中表现优异，多任务成功率达100%，谈判任务中售出率提升56.41%。
summary_en: This paper proposes UP-NRPA, a User Portrait based Nested Rollout Policy Adaptation online framework leveraging Large Language Models to dynamically customize dialogue strategies in goal-oriented dialogue systems. By utilizing real-time user feedback and mapping personality, preferences, and objectives from current user portraits, it adapts to diverse user characteristics without offline reinforcement learning. UP-NRPA achieved a 100% success rate across multiple dialogue tasks and improved the sale-to-list ratio by 56.41% in negotiation tasks.
why_it_matters_zh: UP-NRPA重要在于其创新性的动态适应机制，避免了传统方法中依赖离线训练的局限，提升了对话系统对不同用户需求的响应能力，特别是在谈判任务中显著提升了绩效。
why_it_matters_en: UP-NRPA is significant for its innovative dynamic adaptation mechanism that circumvents the limitations of offline training-dependent methods, enhancing dialogue systems' responsiveness to diverse user needs and notably improving performance in negotiation tasks.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: UP-NRPA: User Portrait based Nested Rollout Policy Adaptation for Planning with Large Language Models in Goal-oriented Dialogue Systems. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_en: History of the Muddy Children Puzzle
summary_zh: 沾泥孩子难题是一个关于知识与无知的经典谜题，推动了认识论逻辑的发展。论文追溯了过去两百年来逻辑与文学出版物中该谜题的起源，并介绍了许多变体，如涉及数字或彩色帽子。文中还提出了一个包含自指的新帽子谜题。
summary_en: The Muddy Children Puzzle is a classic puzzle about knowledge and ignorance that has inspired developments in epistemic logic. The paper traces the origin of the puzzle through logical and literary publications over the past two centuries, presenting numerous variations involving numbers or colored hats. It also introduces a novel hats puzzle involving self-reference.
why_it_matters_zh: 该研究帮助我们理解认识论逻辑的发展历史及沾泥孩子难题的源起与演变，拓展了逻辑谜题的多样性。
why_it_matters_en: This study helps us understand the historical development of epistemic logic and the origin and evolution of the Muddy Children Puzzle, expanding the diversity of logical puzzles.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: History of the Muddy Children Puzzle. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 电商欺骗界面下的网页代理安全基准测试
title_en: Benchmarking Web Agent Safety under E-commerce Deceptive Interfaces
summary_zh: 本文研究了电商领域中现实欺骗界面对网页代理行为的影响。通过引入WebDecept框架，作者能够在已有网页环境中注入七类常见欺骗模式，包括定向广告、域名重定向及购物操控等。测试显示当前多模态网页代理易受多类欺骗界面影响，且基于提示的安全约束难以防范这些失败。此外，研究分析了欺骗设计选择如何影响操控成功率。该成果揭示了随着网页代理向真实环境扩展，亟需解决的安全挑战。
summary_en: This paper studies web agent behavior under realistic deceptive interfaces within the e-commerce domain. Introducing the WebDecept framework, the authors inject seven common deceptive patterns—such as targeted ads, domain redirection, and shopping manipulation—into existing web environments for controlled evaluation. Results indicate current multimodal web agents are highly susceptible to various deceptive interfaces, and prompt-based constraints often fail to prevent these issues. The study also analyzes how design choices of deceptive patterns affect manipulation success. These findings highlight safety challenges as web agents scale toward real-world deployment.
why_it_matters_zh: 随着网页代理在现实任务中的广泛应用，确保其安全防范电商欺骗界面显得尤为重要。该研究通过构建和测试常见欺骗模式，暴露了代理在实际环境中面临的安全风险，为相关防护技术的发展提供理论和实验基础。
why_it_matters_en: As autonomous web agents are widely used in real-world tasks, securing them against e-commerce deceptive interfaces is crucial. This study reveals safety risks by implementing and testing common deceptive patterns, providing theoretical and experimental foundations for developing protective techniques. The work advances understanding necessary for deploying web agents safely at scale.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Benchmarking Web Agent Safety under E-commerce Deceptive Interfaces. Category: image_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: 哪种模型在继承推理中表现更好？
title_en: Which Models Perform Better in Inheritance Reasoning?
summary_zh: 本文介绍了团队PSL参加QIAS 2026阿拉伯伊斯兰继承推理共享任务的情况。该任务评估大型语言模型解决需法律解释、多步推理及精确数值计算的继承案例能力。作者比较了商业模型与开源模型在统一提示策略下的表现，以衡量它们在结构化法律推理中的有效性，同时最小化特定任务的适配。结果显示商业模型在识别继承人、排除规则应用及推理连贯性方面表现更佳，而开源模型在处理依赖性法律决策与份额调整时较不稳定。最佳模型为Gemini 2.5 Flash，MRE达0.989。
summary_en: This paper presents team PSL's participation in the QIAS 2026 Shared Task on Arabic Islamic inheritance reasoning. The task assesses large language models' ability to solve inheritance cases requiring legal interpretation, multi-step reasoning, and precise numerical computation. The study compares commercial and open-source models under a unified prompting strategy to evaluate their effectiveness in structured legal reasoning with minimal task-specific adaptation. Results show a clear performance gap: commercial models excel in identifying heirs, applying exclusion rules, and maintaining reasoning consistency, whereas open-source models are less stable, especially in dependent legal decisions and fractional share adjustments. The best performer is Gemini 2.5 Flash with an MRE of 0.989.
why_it_matters_zh: 继承推理涉及复杂的法律规则和精准计算，选择合适的模型可以提升推理准确度。该研究通过比较商业与开源模型，揭示了它们在序列化法律问题上的优势与不足，有助于推动法律AI模型的发展与应用。
why_it_matters_en: Inheritance reasoning requires complex legal rules and precise calculations, making model selection crucial for accuracy. This study's comparison between commercial and open-source models highlights their strengths and weaknesses in sequential legal reasoning, informing future advancements and applications in legal AI.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Which Models Perform Better in Inheritance Reasoning?. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: QIAS 2026：伊斯兰继承推理共享任务概述
title_en: QIAS 2026: Overview of the Shared Task on Islamic Inheritance Reasoning
summary_zh: 本文全面介绍了QIAS 2026共享任务，该任务作为OSACT7研讨会的一部分并与LREC 2026同期举办。该任务旨在评估大型语言模型在复杂的宗教与法律领域伊斯兰继承推理中的能力。与传统问答基准不同，QIAS 2026强调从自然语言案例端到端推理，包括识别继承人及分配正确份额。任务基于包含12,500个阿拉伯继承案例的MAWARITH数据集，并使用多阶段评估指标MIR-E。共有16支队伍参与，采用提示、检索增强生成及微调等方法。结果显示，伊斯兰继承推理对当前语言模型依然具有极大挑战，尤其在精确法律解释及结构化数字推理阶段。本文总结了任务设计、数据集、评价框架、参赛系统及主要结果。
summary_en: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of the QIAS 2026 shared task, held as part of OSACT7 and co-located with LREC 2026. The task evaluates large language models' ability to perform complex reasoning in Islamic inheritance law, requiring end-to-end processing from natural language cases including heir identification and share allocation. It uses the MAWARITH dataset of 12,500 Arabic inheritance cases annotated with intermediate steps, and evaluates submissions via the multi-step MIR-E metric. Sixteen teams participated using methods like prompting, retrieval-augmented generation, and fine-tuning. Results indicate Islamic inheritance reasoning remains a very challenging benchmark for current models, especially in precise legal interpretation and structured numerical reasoning. The paper summarizes design, dataset, evaluation, systems, and results.
why_it_matters_zh: 伊斯兰继承推理法律复杂且涉及多步骤准确计算，该共享任务提供了大规模真实数据集和多阶段评估标准，有助于推动语言模型在法律推理与复杂数值计算能力上的进步。
why_it_matters_en: Islamic inheritance reasoning involves complex legal rules and multi-step precise calculations. This shared task offers a large real-world dataset and a multi-stage evaluation framework, promoting advancements in language models' legal reasoning and complex numerical calculation capabilities.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: QIAS 2026: Overview of the Shared Task on Islamic Inheritance Reasoning. Category: coding_ai. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: olmo-eval：模型开发循环的评估工作台
title_en: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
summary_zh: Hugging Face推出了olmo-eval，这是一个专为模型开发设计的评估工作台，简化模型评估流程，促进开发者循环中更高效的性能测试和改进。
summary_en: Hugging Face introduced olmo-eval, an evaluation workbench designed for model development that streamlines the evaluation process, enabling more efficient performance testing and improvements during the development loop.
why_it_matters_zh: 评估是模型开发中的关键环节，olmo-eval通过提供统一的评估框架，帮助研究者和开发者快速识别模型优劣，加速优化迭代。
why_it_matters_en: Evaluation is critical in model development; olmo-eval provides a unified framework helping researchers and developers quickly identify model strengths and weaknesses, accelerating optimization cycles.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop. Category: research_papers. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.

title_zh: PyTorch性能分析（第二部分）：从nn.Linear到融合的MLP
title_en: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP
summary_zh: 本文介绍了如何在PyTorch中进行性能分析，重点从标准的nn.Linear模块逐步优化到融合的多层感知机(MLP)，提升模型运行效率。
summary_en: This article focuses on profiling techniques in PyTorch, tracing the optimization from standard nn.Linear modules to a fused multi-layer perceptron (MLP) to improve model execution efficiency.
why_it_matters_zh: 通过深入分析和优化PyTorch模块，帮助开发者理解性能瓶颈并提升模型运行速度。
why_it_matters_en: By exploring profiling and optimization in PyTorch modules, it helps developers understand performance bottlenecks and accelerate model execution.
image_prompt: Modern editorial square illustration for an AI news app. Topic: Profiling in PyTorch (Part 2): From nn.Linear to a Fused MLP. Category: tools_apps. Clean, premium, technology-focused, no text, no logos.
